summary: Phase 7e delta fully verified — backend 13/13 pytest passed (admin OTP + 4-type KYC + soft-block proposal guard + 165 ops + legacy dev-admin token + 3-step checklist). Frontend Playwright verified CHANGES 1a/1b/1c/1d(admin & non-admin)/2a/2b/2c/3b end-to-end. Admin phone OTP login at /admin works (dev_otp echoed, verify → localStorage user.current_role='admin', roles include admin, redirect to /admin/dashboard). Non-admin phone verify stays on /admin with no tokens applied. Direct nav to /admin/dashboard as non-admin correctly redirects to /admin (not /login). ProfileComplete wizard reduced to 3 steps (photo/city/verification) with 'Step X of 3' subtitle; verification step has go-to-verify button; last step button reads 'Finish'. /kyc/verify shows 4 cards with all data-testids. Onboarding checklist returns exactly 3 steps (profile_pic/city/verification). Role switcher excludes admin (code + non-admin filter verified).
critical_code_review_comments: App.js:80 and App.js:107 both declare a route for '/admin/login' → AdminLogin. This is a harmless duplicate (first registration wins in react-router v6), but should be deduped for hygiene.

AdminOtpLogin.jsx:83 calls POST /v1/users/me/switch-role wrapped in try/catch; failures silently ignored. If backend requires the role to already be present in user.roles (which it is for 9039791530), fine — but for edge users the local applyAuthResponse overrides current_role='admin' anyway, which could desync UI vs backend. Consider surfacing the switch-role failure as a warning toast.

identity_routes.py:53-99 — All 4 endpoints do format validation BEFORE the rate-limit check (_rate). This means a spammer submitting invalid data does not consume their daily quota. Consider swapping the order OR record failed attempts separately.

AdminOtpLogin.jsx:37-41: useEffect redirects any existing admin user to /admin/dashboard on component mount, meaning if an admin visits /admin they cannot re-login (they're always bounced). This is likely intentional but if the intent is to allow admin to sign out and back in, they'd first need to hit a logout route.
identity_service returns `additional_data.ifsc_last4` correctly; account_number is properly excluded on read path. Recommend also logging (audit) admin-only KYC deletions.
test_credentials: Admin phone 9039791530 (dev_otp echoed). Fallback dev-admin magic link token j0XOw7fmnW8-...RRnXt-_3qQZtiQ8AyK2otlqN works for legacy /admin/login. Fresh random 7XXXXXXXXX / 8XXXXXXXXX phones create unverified users for soft-block tests.
seed_data_creation: Backend test suite creates 2 fresh random-phone users per run (customer-only + one that becomes vendor+verified after aadhaar submit). Admin (9039791530) accumulated approved KYC docs for all 4 doc types (aadhaar/pan/gst/bank) during the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 7e priority-1 changes verified. /admin route = AdminOtpLogin (phone OTP), /admin/dashboard behind RequireAdmin guard which redirects non-admins to /admin (NOT /login). /admin/login (legacy dev-admin token) still functions and remains registered — App.js has it declared twice (harmless dupe). Backend: 165 endpoints, /api/health=200. KYC status endpoint returns docs keyed by type with masked numbers; bank additional_data exposes ifsc_last4 only (account_number correctly stripped for privacy). Soft-block on POST /proposals/ returns 403 with 'Please verify at least one identity document' for unverified users; once ANY of 4 docs is approved, the 403 identity block is gone (may return 404 for missing requirement which is expected). Role switcher menu (RoleSwitcherChip.jsx) filters roles.filter((r) => r !== 'admin' && ROLE_META[r]) and ROLE_META has no admin key — verified both by code and by Playwright (chip rendered, admin never in menu items).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration. All 3 changes + regression pass.
